extraction.abstract: This Final Report describes how the Kokes Awards program was carried out for the 2007 meeting with regard to selection of students and disbursement of funds received from DOE and other sources. The objective of the Richard J. Kokes Travel Award program of the American Catalysis Society is to encourage graduate students to attend and participate meaningfully in the biennial North American Catalysis Society Meeting.
extraction.notes: Technical Report. Title: "Final Report on Kokes Awards for the 20th North American Catalysis Society Meeting". Published 2008-12-31. Report Number: DOE-ER--15866-1-Final-Report. DOI resolves directly to PDF at https://www.osti.gov/servlets/purl/1070070/. Biblio record at https://www.osti.gov/biblio/1070070.
